2	
3	## Code Style
4	- Use TypeScript strict mode
5	- Prefer const over let
6	- Use named exports over default exports for utilities
7	
8	## Git Conventions
9	- Use conventional commits: feat:, fix:, chore:, docs:
10	- PR titles: type: short description
11	
12	## Testing
13	- Place tests next to source files with .test.ts suffix
14	- Use Vitest for unit tests
15	
16	## File Organization
17	- Utils go in src/utils/
18	- Middleware in src/middleware/
19	- Services in src/se… [+38 chars]
